daily.description: 100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run — clone, customize, ship.

daily.description: Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.

daily.description: The open source AI engineering platform for agents, LLMs, and ML models. MLflow enables teams of all sizes to debug, evaluate, monitor, and optimize production-quality AI applications while controlling costs and managing access to models and data.
daily.businessSummary: 适合构建 AI 应用、模型工作流、RAG、Agent 或 LLM 评测监控。

daily.description: Cross-vendor messaging for CLI AI coding agents — let Claude Code, Codex, Gemini & Copilot talk to each other in one team. Bash + SQLite, no daemon, no framework.

daily.description: AI trading research engine for Claude Code. Analyze stocks (technical, fundamental, sentiment, risk, thesis), options strategies, sector rotation, portfolio analysis, and PDF reports. 16 skills, 5 parallel agents. Research tool only — not financial advice.
